studyName: The Genetic Architecture of Smoking and Smoking Cessation

variables.name: age_first_drink
variables.description: Age when had first drink of alcohol

variables.name: age_first_use_oth
variables.description: Age when first used drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.name: age_first_use_tob
variables.description: Age onset of any  tobacco use

variables.name: age_last_drink
variables.description: Age when had last drink of alcohol

variables.name: age_last_use_oth
variables.description: Age when last used drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.name: age_last_use_tob
variables.description: Age when last used any form of tobacco

variables.name: alc_dep_ons
variables.description: Age onset of DSM4 alcohol dependence

variables.name: alc_dep_rec
variables.description: Age recency of DSM4 alcohol dependence

variables.name: alc_sx3
variables.description: Using alcohol in larger amounts or over longer period than intended

variables.name: alc_sx4
variables.description: Persistent desire or unsuccessful efforts to cut down or control alcohol use

variables.name: alc_sx5
variables.description: Great amount of time spent in activities necessary to obtain, use or recover from the effects of alcohol

variables.name: alc_sx6
variables.description: Gave up or reduced important social, occupational, or recreational activities because of alcohol use

variables.name: alc_sx7
variables.description: Alcohol use despite knowledge of persistent or recurrent physical or psychological problems likely to have been caused or exacerbated by alcohol

variables.name: cig_daily
variables.description: Has participant ever smoked cigarettes daily for a month or more?

variables.name: cig_min_use
variables.description: Has participant smoked 100 cigarettes in lifetime OR ever smoked daily for a month or more?

variables.name: coc_dep_ons
variables.description: Age onset of DSM4 cocaine dependence

variables.name: coc_dep_rec
variables.description: Age recency of DSM4 cocaine dependence

variables.name: coc_sx3
variables.description: Using cocaine in larger amounts or over longer period than intended

variables.name: coc_sx4
variables.description: Persistent desire or unsuccessful efforts to cut down or control cocaine use

variables.name: coc_sx5
variables.description: Great amount of time spent in activities necessary to obtain, use or recover from the effects of cocaine

variables.name: coc_sx6
variables.description: Gave up or reduced important social, occupational, or recreational activities because of cocaine use

variables.name: coc_sx7
variables.description: Cocaine use despite knowledge of persistent or recurrent physical or psychological problems likely to have been caused or exacerbated by cocaine

variables.name: ever_cig
variables.description: Has participant ever smoked a cigarette?

variables.name: ever_drink
variables.description: Ever had even one drink of alcohol

variables.name: ever_oth
variables.description: Has participant ever used drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates?

variables.name: ftnd_1
variables.description: Participant's lifetime score for Fagerström Test for Nicotine Dependence (FTND) question 1: How soon after waking do you smoke your first cigarette?

variables.name: ftnd_2
variables.description: Participant's lifetime score for FTND question 2: Do you find it difficult to refrain from smoking in places where it is forbidden?

variables.name: ftnd_3
variables.description: Participant's lifetime score for FTND question 3: Which cigarette would you hate most to give up?

variables.name: ftnd_4
variables.description: Participant's lifetime score for FTND question 4: How many cigarettes/day do you smoke?

variables.name: ftnd_5
variables.description: Participant's lifetime score for FTND question 5: Do you smoke more frequently during the first hours after waking than during the rest of the day?

variables.name: ftnd_6
variables.description: Participant's lifetime score for FTND question 6: Do you smoke when you are so ill that you are in bed most of the day?

variables.name: ftnd_total
variables.description: Participant's lifetime score on the FTND

variables.name: max_cigs
variables.description: Largest number of cigarettes smoked in 24 hours

variables.name: max_drinks
variables.description: Largest number of alcoholic drinks consumed in 24 hours

variables.name: mj_sx7
variables.description: Marijuana use despite knowledge of persistent or recurrent physical or psychological problems likely to have been caused or exacerbated by marijuana

variables.name: ndss_score
variables.description: Total Overall Score on the Nicotine Dependence Syndrome (NDSS) Scale

variables.description: Age onset of DSM4 nicotine dependence

variables.description: Age recency of DSM4 nicotine dependence

variables.description: Age onset of regular drinking (drinking once a month for 6 months or more)

variables.description: Age recency of DSM4 opiate dependence

variables.description: Using opiates in larger amounts or over longer period than intended

variables.description: Persistent desire or unsuccessful efforts to cut down or control opiates use

variables.name: oth_dep
variables.description: DSM4 dependence on drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.name: oth_dep_ons
variables.description: Age onset of DSM4 dependence on drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.name: oth_dep_rec
variables.description: Age recency of DSM4 dependence on drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.name: oth_sx1
variables.description: Tolerance to drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.description: Withdrawal from drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.description: Using drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates in larger amounts or over longer period than intended

variables.name: oth_sx4
variables.description: Persistent desire or unsuccessful efforts to cut down or control drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.name: oth_sx5
variables.description: Great amount of time spent in activities necessary to obtain, use or recover from the effects of drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.name: oth_sx6
variables.description: Gave up or reduced important social, occupational, or recreational activities because of drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.name: oth_sx7
variables.description: Use of drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates despite knowledge of persistent or recurrent physical or psychological problems likely to have been caused or exacerbated by drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.name: oth_sx_tot
variables.description: Number of symptoms endorsed for drugs other than marijuana, cocaine or opiates

variables.description: Study from which the data were generated
